blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,530 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
